tasks.title: Redesign Stop hook: fast-path back-pressure, working re-entry guard, trimmed output
tasks.description: Current Stop hook in .claude/settings.json runs the full `bun run test` suite on every stop event. Five problems: (1) the `export STOP_HOOK_ACTIVE=1` re-entry guard is a no-op because env vars set inside a subshell hook do not persist to the next hook invocation; (2) runs the full unit+integration+e2e suite unconditionally (30s–several minutes) even when no code changed; (3) injects the entire test stdout/stderr into `stopReason` on failure, flooding context and triggering context rot; (4) no fast-to-slow ladder and no --bail — a type error is discovered only after e2e containers spin up; (5) no `git diff` gate, so runs even when only docs/progress/.claude changed. Target design: transcript-id-keyed file lock for re-entry, skip when `git diff HEAD --quiet -- src tests drizzle`, run tsc --noEmit then biome then `vitest run --bail --changed HEAD`, fall back to full suite only on an explicit completion marker, truncate failure output to first N failing test names plus first error block.
tasks.notes: Sourced from harness-engineering-research.md review (2026-04-17). Research §4.6 explicitly flags full-suite Stop hooks as anti-pattern. ADR skipped per user pre-approval; logged in progress/adr-debt.md for backfill.

tasks.title: Add scripts/init.sh session smoke check wired to SessionStart hook
tasks.description: Create scripts/init.sh that verifies the dev environment is healthy before a session starts coding. Checks: (1) docker compose services postgres + redis are up and healthy, start them if not; (2) Postgres reachable on 5432; (3) `bunx drizzle-kit check` reports no pending migration diff; (4) Redis reachable via redis-cli ping; (5) env validates (import src/config/env succeeds — Zod runs); (6) app boots — start server in background, curl /healthz, kill; (7) optional fast tsc --noEmit. Success: single `✓ harness healthy` line. Failure: specific failing check + suggested fix. Wire into .claude/settings.json SessionStart hook so the output injects as additionalContext — makes the check enforced, not hoped-for. Consider a TTL so UserPromptSubmit does not pay the cost every turn. Likely needs an ADR (new cross-cutting session-start pattern per ADR-002 trigger checklist).
tasks.notes: Sourced from harness-engineering-research.md review (2026-04-17). Anthropic Initializer/Coding Agent pattern §3.1. Especially valuable post-SQLite→Postgres migration (TASK-015) and for ADR-024 worktree isolation. ADR skipped per user pre-approval; logged in progress/adr-debt.md for backfill.

tasks.title: Add /repo-gc garbage-collection slash command for periodic harness entropy sweep
tasks.description: Create .claude/commands/repo-gc.md that runs a two-pass sweep. Pass 1 (deterministic, cheap): knip/ts-prune for unused exports; broken relative links in docs/**/*.md; orphan .claude/rules/*.md not referenced anywhere; progress/current.json tasks marked completed >30d with no commit hash; progress/issues/ items marked fixed >14d as archive candidates. Pass 2 (LLM-driven, semantic): for each ADR in docs/adr/, scan src/ for violations (e.g., ADR-013 userId-from-JWT → grep for req.body.userId / params.userId); verify docs/**/*.md cited paths + function signatures still exist; flag route handlers deviating from the modal pattern (missing OpenAPI spec, missing zod validation); flag CLAUDE.md instruction-count drift above ~150. Output: one summary report + append real ADR violations to progress/adr-debt.md. Start as on-demand slash command; promote to scheduled remote agent (via `schedule` skill) once false-positive rate is low. Include a suppression mechanism (e.g., `.gc-ignore` or inline comments) so repeat false positives don't tank signal.
tasks.notes: Sourced from harness-engineering-research.md review (2026-04-17). OpenAI GC agent pattern §3.2.4. Closes existing tech_debt item (quality scores not automated) and turns progress/adr-debt.md from a log into a backpressure loop. ADR skipped per user pre-approval; logged in progress/adr-debt.md for backfill.

tasks.title: Add progress/journal.md append-only narrative channel alongside JSON task state
tasks.description: Introduce a free-form narrative channel to complement the structured JSON state. Today progress/current.json captures what's true (status, commits, deps) but has nowhere for 'what I tried, what I learned, what surprised me' — the context Anthropic's two-channel recipe (§3.1) calls out as essential for long-running multi-session agents. Plan: (1) create progress/journal.md with a header explaining format (append-only, reverse-chronological, ~3-6 bullets per session, cap ~150 lines before rotation); (2) update CLAUDE.md §Task Management to point agents at it on session start and ask them to append a short entry on session end; (3) optional SessionEnd hook that appends a date-stamped stub the agent fills in; (4) rotation rule — when file exceeds 150 lines, move oldest entries to progress/archive/journal-YYYY-MM.md. Entries should capture rejected approaches, surprises, operational gotchas (e.g. 'test DB on 5433 slow to accept connections on cold start'), cross-session hand-off notes. Do NOT rewrite old entries — strictly append. Keep it separate from commit messages (which are keyed to changes, not reasoning) and per-task `notes` field (capped at 1-2 sentences per current rule).
tasks.notes: Sourced from harness-engineering-research.md review (2026-04-17). Anthropic two-channel state pattern §3.1. Especially useful given /start-tasks batch execution and ADR-024 worktree parallelism.

tasks.title: Worker: show clean error warning when Redis is unavailable
tasks.description: Update worker-entry.ts to detect Redis connection failure on startup and log a clear, human-readable error instead of crashing with an unhandled exception.

tasks.title: Migrate database from SQLite to PostgreSQL
tasks.description: Replace SQLite/LibSQL with PostgreSQL using postgres-js driver. Convert schema to pgTable with native timestamps, add Docker PG services, update env config, repos, services, types, tests, and Better Auth adapter. No data migration needed.

known_issues: drizzle-kit push may fail in vitest global-setup.ts — needs diagnosis (TASK-006)
